title: Your Certs Are Expiring: Digital Certificate Management Explained
summary: IBM Technology explains digital certificate management and lifecycle processes, highlighting how expired certificates can disrupt websites and APIs. The video covers why shorter certificate lifetimes affect operational risk and positions certificate lifecycle management as a critical cybersecurity discipline.
